## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] New/changed tiles respect QSvg (no 8-digit hex; text uses `fitSize`) — see `docs/CONVENTIONS.md`
- [ ] UUIDs follow the 4-segment (main) / 5+-segment (action) rule
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
